narrative:
Lebanon City has 14,141 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
